top_signals.title: Israeli military steps up attacks on Hizbollah
top_signals.summary: Far-right officials, who fear a US-Iran peace deal could rein in Israel, have called for ‘high-intensity’ campaign in Lebanon
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US strikes Iranian missile sites as peace talks continue
top_signals.summary: Washington announces ‘self-defence’ operation against targets in southern Iran
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Top ECB policymakers lay groundwork for June rate rise
top_signals.summary: Philip Lane and Isabel Schnabel warn higher energy prices are spilling over into wider economy ahead of central bank’s next meeting
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India boosts drone warfare capability with compact missile
top_signals.summary: Indian Defense Minister Rajnath Singh called the successful development trials a “strategic milestone” toward self-reliance in defense.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FBI warns of Kali365 phishing service targeting Microsoft 365 accounts
top_signals.summary: The FBI is warning about the Kali365 phishing-as-a-service platform (PhaaS) that is used to hijack Microsoft 365 accounts by abusing OAuth device code authentication to steal session tokens and bypass multi-factor authentication (MFA). [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Liquid launches Co-Invest app, bringing AI-powered live trade execution into ChatGPT and Claude
top_signals.summary: Co-Invest supports crypto, equities, FX, Polymarket positions and pre-IPO secondaries across over 500 markets, according to Liquid.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
